name: github_get_concurrency_group
description: Get a specific GitHub Actions concurrency group for a repository including its queue (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/concurrency_groups/{concurrency_group_name}). Returns group_name, group_url, total_count, group_members. 404 if inactive/missing. Optional ahead_of_run or ahead_of_job (mutually exclusive). Classic tokens need repo scope for private repos. See GitHub REST Actions concurrency groups.
